posts.author: NorthbridgeNights
posts.text: Just a quick reminder that the Northbridge Library will be closed this weekend for essential maintenance on their solar panels. They're aiming to finish by Monday morning so services should be back to normal then! #community #library
posts.explanation: This is a benign notice about local facility maintenance that does not violate any policy.
posts.bio: Fictional community notices and service updates.

posts.author: MelodyWinslow
posts.text: I'm feeling really low right now and overwhelmed by everything. Sometimes I just wish there was a way to make the pain stop, maybe if I could hurt myself it would finally be over. 💔 #struggling #sadness
posts.explanation: This post indicates immediate self-harm risk and requires specialist assessment.
